channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLhealthAndWellness, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Sequential versus upfront oxaliplatin therapy may yield similar outcomes in metastatic colorectal cancer
item.description: Sequential and upfront treatment of metastatic colorectal cancer with oxaliplatin-based therapy do not produce significantly different outcomes.

item.title: Giuliana Rancic opens up about career, breast cancer, and staying active
item.description: In a WebMD Real Stories guide, Rancic, 51, reflects on her red carpet career, breast cancer experience, and active lifestyle.

item.title: Utah launches first-in-nation pilot for autonomous AI prescription renewals
item.description: Utah has launched a 12-month pilot program allowing autonomous artificial intelligence to handle prescription renewals.

item.title: Top vitamins and nutrients recommended for women
